workflow.title: Clone Your Own Voice in

cta.title: Make your content go viral
cta.desc: Create engaging AI voiceovers for TikTok, YouTube, and more.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I use the audio for commercial purposes?
faq.q1Ans: Yes! With our Pro and Enterprise plans, you get full commercial rights to all generated audio. You can use it in YouTube videos, podcasts, advertisements, and more.
faq.q2: How many languages do you support?
faq.q2Ans: We currently support over 50 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, and many more, each with multiple distinct regional accents.
faq.q3Ans: Absolutely. You can start for free with 1000 characters per month. No credit card required to get started.

footer.title: The world's most advanced text-to-speech engine. Converting your words into lifelike audio in seconds.

tryBefore.question: Can I try Botnoi voice before paying?

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods are supported?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept debit, credit and PromptPay payments.

cancelAddOn.question: Can I cancel my add-on anytime?
cancelAddOn.answer: Yes, you can cancel your add-on at any time. The cancellation will be canceled in the next billing cycle. Your Add-on will be downgraded to a non-Add-on.

taxInvoice.question: Can I have a tax invoice?
taxInvoice.answer: For customers who need a full tax invoice. You can request and attach proof of payment to the email. admin@botnoigroup.com.

membership.title: Members receive points every month
